query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Increased gas prices are straining North Texas families
articles.description: Continuously high gas prices in North Texas are causing some residents to face financial hardships. Local nonprofits are working to ease the need.

articles.title: Wall Street holds steadier as AI stocks recover some of their sell-off
articles.description: Wall Street held steadier and recovered some of its sell-off from last week. Oil prices, meanwhile, rose Monday following fighting between Israel and Iran, but they pared their biggest gains. The S&P 500 added 0.3%, coming off its 2.6% drop from Friday that was its worst since October. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dipped 0.2%, and the Nasdaq composite climbed 0.9%. Some of the best performers were companies that sell computer chips, memory and other products fueling the AI boom. They had plunged Friday amid worries that their prices had shot too high amid AI euphoria.

articles.title: Investors Fled From Bearish Oil Fund at a Record Pace Last Week
articles.description: An exchange-traded product that profits when oil prices fall had its biggest weekly outflow on record as several buffers that had helped keep rallies in check begin to fade.

articles.title: Trump approval stays near record low as most Americans expect higher gas prices
articles.description: President Donald Trump's approval rate held near the lowest ​levels of his political career in recent days as most Americans said they expected gasoline prices to keep ‌rising amid the Iran war, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll completed on Monday.

articles.title: Trump's Struggles: Approval Ratings, Gas Prices, and Political Battles
articles.description: President Donald Trump's approval ratings remain low amidst concerns over rising gas prices linked to the Iran conflict. Only 22% of Americans approve of his cost of living management. Despite military strikes, voters are leaning towards Democrats in upcoming congressional elections according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll.

articles.title: Iran, Israel Halt Strikes on Each Other for Now
articles.description: Oil prices which had risen by as much as 5% after the flurry of attacks - pared gains when Iran's military said its first wave of strikes on Israel was over. The dollar retreated from its highest level in nearly two months.

articles.title: Oil prices, Europeans cut back on driving, and upcoming events
articles.description: Iran and Israel have agreed to stop a round of attacks that drove up oil prices.

articles.title: Healthcare, Europe emerge as alternatives to AI
articles.description: Oil prices, inflation concerns and stretched AI valuations are prompting investors to consider diversification beyond technology stocks.
